violations.text: Insect control device observed stored above the food prep sink and food-contact surfaces (clean food containers) in the kitchen. 6-202.13 Insect Control Devices, Design and Installation. Insect control devices shall be installed so that: (1) The devices are not located over a FOOD preparation area; and (2) Dead insects and insect fragments are prevented from being impelled onto or falling on exposed FOOD; clean EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, and LINENS; and unwrapped SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES. -Staff will move the insect control device to a different location away from food prep areas and food-contact surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Ice buildup observed at the condenser and fans in the walk-in freezer. Ice buildup shall be broken down and removed from condenser/fans to prevent possible blockage of cold air flow. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

At the time of inspection, a manager certified in food safety was not on-site. There is to be an on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per the PIC, food safety course is currently set up to be taken (Jan. 4th, 2024). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

The front service line does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Per the owner, Hand Sink is to be installed and picture of installed sink will be sent to this inspector. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

At the time of inspection, an manager certified in food safety was not on-site. There is to be an on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per the PIC, food safety course is currently being taken. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The kitchen service line does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Hand washing sink is to be added to the front service line to allow for convenient use/location. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

At the time of inspection, reduced oxygen packaged seafood items were observed thawing in the walk-in cooler in their intact packaging. REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED seafood that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. Based on observed temperature, packaging was cut open at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
